UW._comment: Access to Unicorn Way guarantees the Level 5 requirement for doing certain quests in Olde Town and Golem Court early. Do the Combat Tutorial for extra XP.

GC._comment: Friendly Teleport to Kane ShadowBane in The Drains to access this area before finishing Unicorn Way.

EarlyOT.requires: |Area-Olde Town| and ({canReachLocation(To Muldoon)} or |Teleport-Friendly| or (|Area-Shopping District| and |Teleport-Majid|))
EarlyOT._comment: Friendly teleport to the Bazaar or teleport to Majid to access early. These quests seem to become available at Level 5.

Kraken._comment: Friendly teleport to a random player to access early. Can be reached directly from Olde Town after Muldoon by walking through the closed gate.

Larry._comment: Friendly teleport to a random player to access early. Can be reached directly from Olde Town after Muldoon by walking through the closed gate.

Judd.requires: |Area-Ravenwood| and |Area-Olde Town| and (|Area-Shopping District| or |Teleport-Friendly|) and |Building-Judd| and |Slot-Pet| and |Slot-Mount|

Level7._comment: Access to any street post-Judd should be significant enough to consistently reach Level 7, I think. Cyclops might be an issue here due to getting walled at Laundry without Shopping District.

Bastilla.requires: {ItemValue(damage:57)} and |Building-Bastilla| and (|Area-Dark Cave| or |Area-Triton Avenue|) and (|Teleport-Mark| or {YamlDisabled(early_mark)})

AkillesSkip.requires: |Area-Cyclops Lane| and |Area-Firecat Alley| and |Area-Dark Cave| and |Area-Shopping District| and |Building-Bastilla| and |Building-Alicane| and (|Building-Akilles| or {YamlEnabled(akilles_skip)})
